name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company deciding whether an idea deserves roadmap time without a dedicated strategy/research function
problem_statement: Senior product leaders commit roadmap capacity to ideas with untested assumptions because the evaluation is informal, unstructured, and hard to challenge in the moment
artifact_type: single-page web app with progressive sections and a live-updating verdict side panel
